description: This file is a Java interface defining a repository for CorrectiveAction entities, extending JpaRepository, and providing custom query methods for filtering CorrectiveActions based on status, due date, and defect ID.

classes.name: CorrectiveActionRepository
classes.description: Repository interface for managing CorrectiveAction entities with custom query methods.

methods.name: findByStatus
methods.description: Returns a paginated list of CorrectiveActions filtered by their status.

methods.name: findByDueDateBefore
methods.description: Returns a paginated list of CorrectiveActions with a due date before the specified date.

methods.name: findByDefectId
methods.description: Returns a paginated list of CorrectiveActions associated with a specific defect ID.
